_comments.env_vars: Set EXA_API_KEY and GITHUB_TOKEN in your shell profile (~/.zshrc)
_comments.disabling: Remove or comment out servers you don't need
_comments.context_warning: Keep under 10 MCPs enabled to preserve context window

exa.description: Exa AI neural search — deep web research, code context, academic search (needs EXA_API_KEY in shell)

github.description: GitHub API — repos, PRs, issues, code search (needs GITHUB_TOKEN in shell)

filesystem.description: Enhanced filesystem operations — read, write, search files. IMPORTANT: Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_HOME_DIRECTORY with your actual home path (e.g., /Users/yourname on macOS, /home/yourname on Linux)

sequential-thinking.description: Multi-step reasoning — helps Claude think through complex problems step by step
